title: Outreach Pitch v2 — Shorter, Value-First, Non-Salesy
principles: Lead with specific value to THEIR readers
No 'I'd love to get a backlink' language
Offer a custom example for their article topic
Close with a simple yes/no question
template: Hi [name] — I built a free [calculator type] that your readers might find useful for [specific article/post]. Example: [specific scenario with numbers]. Want me to create a custom version for your [article topic]? No cost, no signup, no data collection.

new_prospects.strategy: Target smaller finance/credit/mortgage bloggers with 1K-50K monthly visitors
new_prospects.reason: Follow up existing 20 on Jun 13 before sending new batch
